inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance CRWV regular market price 2026-07-18
inputs.fcf_source: Normalized owner cash per share after interest burden and growth capital spending needs; FY2025 OCF $3.1B ($5.88/sh) includes $869M interest paid and contract/working-capital timing — not sustainable equity free cash at current leverage (10-K FY2025)
inputs.rpo_source: $60.7B remaining performance obligations at December 31, 2025 vs $15.1B prior year; ~5-year weighted-average contract duration (10-K FY2025)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and equivalents $3.127B at December 31, 2025 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.openai_commitment_source: Master services agreement March 2025: OpenAI committed up to ~$11.9B through October 2030 (10-K FY2025); September 2025 order form cites up to ~$6.5B through May 2031
inputs.meta_commitment_source: Meta order form September 2025: initially ~$14.2B through December 2031; Q1 2026 10-Q cites up to ~$21B inclusive of additional capacity options
inputs.nvidia_investment_source: January 2026 private placement: ~23M Class A shares at $87.20 for ~$2.0B gross proceeds (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.normalization_note: GPU cloud infrastructure at scale with positive operating cash flow but negative net income driven by $1.2B+ interest expense and heavy growth capital spending. Lawrence starting owner cash $1.25/sh is normalized after interest drag and sustaining capital needs — not raw FY2025 OCF per share.

marvin_floor.notes: Normalized owner cash after interest and growth capex haircut; filings only for revenue, RPO, debt

blended_best.notes: Marvin floor only; no approved third-party blend

bear.notes: Hyperscaler contract renegotiation or delay; GPU depreciation faster than revenue; refinancing stress on $25B debt stack; customer concentration bite

base.notes: RPO converts over ~5-year contract duration at improving margins; interest expense grows slower than revenue; Microsoft/OpenAI/Meta commitments support utilization

bull.notes: Full $60.7B RPO ramp on time; operating leverage as operating income turns sustainably positive; multiple re-rates with Nasdaq-100 index inclusion

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Core Scientific acquisition close and synergy timing
GPU cluster depreciation vs contract pricing spread
Refinancing path for 2026-2028 debt maturities ($6.1B in 2026 per 10-Q)

capex_stress_2026.notes: Illustrative trough if growth capital spending re-accelerates beyond OCF — not Lawrence starting cash flow

ai_inflection_bull.fcf_y0_note: RPO conversion at contract margins minus normalized interest [Assumption]

options.label: Remaining performance obligations / committed contracts
options.base_terminal_rationale: RPO conversion modeled in segment growth years 1-5, not separate terminal row
options.evidence: RPO $60.7B at December 31, 2025; ~5-year weighted-average contract duration (10-K FY2025)

options.label: Core Scientific acquisition (pending/announced)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Acquisition synergies and colocation integration not in Lawrence base until close terms filing-grounded
options.evidence: Core Scientific acquisition call July 2025 (IR transcript); terms per 8-K filings [HUMAN REVIEW]

corporate_drag.notes: Interest expense $1.229B FY2025 / 527M shares ≈ $2.33/sh drag on equity owner cash

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Property and equipment net $36.4B (Mar 2026) reflects GPU clusters; equity $4.8B vs $25B debt — economic leverage not in book per share alone

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: RPO $60.7B = contracted GPU capacity not yet fully in revenue (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Net loss $1.2B FY2025 despite $5.1B revenue; interest expense $1.229B burdens equity (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: RPO $60.7B with OpenAI, Meta, Microsoft master agreements (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: NVIDIA strategic investment at $87.20/share Jan 2026 is disclosed mark, not hidden stake

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: GPU cloud revenue already reflects contracted AI compute; backlog converts through segment growth

optionality_gate.notes: RPO $60.7B ÷ 527M ≈ $115/sh is contracted obligation not owner cash; backlog informs bull sensitivity only

evidence_refresh.notes: AI GPU cloud backlog and hyperscaler contract context; not auto-included in Lawrence base IRR

stance_proposal.override_reason: Revenue scale and $60.7B RPO are real, but Microsoft ~67% concentration, $25B debt, and $1.2B net loss cap moat and dhando. Lawrence base IRR below ~15% hurdle at $73.21 on normalized $1.25/sh owner cash.

overlay_results.notes: RPO conversion at contract margins minus normalized interest [Assumption]

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_groups.label: Operating business (fallback)
component_groups.adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business (fallback)

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

blockers: A complete, explicit ownership/component schedule has not been supplied.

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
